privacy.notes: This contract bundle contains synthetic fixtures only.

commands.name: validate-year
commands.notes: Validate whether a pricing year is complete, internally consistent, and backed by fixture evidence.

validation_rules.label: Pricing year well formed
validation_rules.description: Reject malformed pricing-year labels before checking repository-local evidence.

validation_rules.label: Manifest completeness
validation_rules.description: Require the pricing-year manifest to declare the expected inputs, outputs, and provenance fields.

validation_rules.label: Fixture evidence present
validation_rules.description: Require synthetic validation fixtures for the year before marking the year as validated.

examples.name: validate-year-pass
examples.description: Synthetic validate-year output showing a pass state for a year with local evidence.

examples.name: validate-year-fail
examples.description: Synthetic validate-year output showing a fail state when fixture evidence is missing.
